puzzleDescription: Learn to use variables in a sentence.
objective:
1. Create a variable for your name and age.
2. Then print in the console: My name is (name) and I am (age) years old.
expectedOutputPattern: ^My name is [A-Za-z][A-Za-z ]* and I am [0-9]+ years old\.$
requiredCodePattern: System\.out\.println\s*\(\s*"My name is "\s*\+\s*name\s*\+\s*" and I am "\s*\+\s*age\s*\+\s*" years old\."\s*\)
hints: Use String for name and int for age.
Use + to combine variables with text.
